mapper.select: SELECT folder_id, folder_name, parent_id, sort_order, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_alarm_folder ORDER BY folder_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tb_alarm_folder (folder_name, parent_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{folderName}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id, folder_id, tag_name, address, plc_id, alarm_msg, level, enabled, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_alarm_tag WHERE folder_id = #{folderId} ORDER BY tag_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_alarm_tag (folder_id, tag_name, address, plc_id, alarm_msg, level, enabled) VALUES (#{folderId}, #{tagName}, #{address}, #{plcId}, #{alarmMsg}, #{level}, #{enabled}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE address = VALUES(address), plc_id = VALUES(plc_id), alarm_msg = VALUES(alarm_msg), level = VALUES(level), enabled = VALUES(enabled)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_alarm_tag SET tag_name = #{tagName}, address = #{address}, plc_id = #{plcId}, alarm_msg = #{alarmMsg}, level = #{level}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.select: SELECT plc_id, ip, port, plc_type, label, enabled FROM tb_plc ORDER BY plc_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_plc (plc_id, ip, port, plc_type, label, enabled) VALUES (#{plcId}, #{ip}, #{port}, #{plcType}, #{label}, #{enabled}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ip = VALUES(ip), port = VALUES(port), plc_type = VALUES(plc_type), label = VALUES(label), enabled = VALUES(enabled)
mapper.select: SELECT h.history_id, h.tag_id, t.tag_name, t.address, t.alarm_msg, t.level, t.plc_id, DATE_FORMAT(h.occur_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS occur_time, DATE_FORMAT(h.clear_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS clear_time, DATE_FORMAT(h.ack_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ack_time, h.ack_user, h.value_at_occur FROM tb_alarm_history h JOIN tb_alarm_tag t ON h.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE h.clear_time IS NULL ORDER BY h.occur_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT h.history_id, h.tag_id, t.tag_name, t.address, t.alarm_msg, t.level, t.plc_id, DATE_FORMAT(h.occur_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS occur_time, DATE_FORMAT(h.clear_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS clear_time, DATE_FORMAT(h.ack_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ack_time, h.ack_user, h.value_at_occur FROM tb_alarm_history h JOIN tb_alarm_tag t ON h.tag_id = t.tag_id ORDER BY h.occur_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
